channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NTPCGREEN] NTPC Green Energy: 150 MW solar project in Rajasthan now operational
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NTPC Green Energy Limited announced that 150 MW of its 300 MW solar project in Rajasthan has been declared commercially operational as of April 18, 2026. This project is held by Project Sixteen Renewable Power Private Limited, a step-down subsidiary of the joint venture ONGC NTPC Green Private Limited. This addition increases the NTPC Green Energy Limited Group's total installed commercial capacity from 10,126.40 MW to 10,276.40 MW, enhancing its renewable energy portfolio.

  • 150 MW solar capacity in Rajasthan declared commercially operational.
  • This capacity is part of a larger 300 MW solar project.
  • Group's total installed capacity rises to 10,276.40 MW.
  • Project is under a step-down subsidiary of a joint venture.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NTPC Green Energy Ltd | Category: Project Update

item.title: [KERALAYUR] Kerala Ayurveda's ₹5.31L fine waiver rejected by BSE
item.description:
Kerala Ayurveda Ltd announced that BSE Limited rejected its waiver application for a ₹5,31,000 fine (including GST) on April 16, 2026. The fine, imposed on August 29, 2025, was due to non-compliance with Board composition requirements under Regulation 17(1) of the Listing Regulations for the period from October 1, 2024, to June 30, 2025. The company had already remitted the fine amount to BSE under protest on March 10, 2026. The company states there is no material financial implication beyond the fine amount.

  • BSE rejected waiver for ₹5.31 lakh fine.
  • Fine for non-compliance with Board composition rules.
  • Violation period was Oct 2024 to June 2025.
  • Company paid the fine under protest.
  • No material financial impact beyond the fine.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KERALA AYURVEDA LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [GUJHOTE] Gujarat Hotels Board to meet Apr 23 for FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Gujarat Hotels Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for April 23, 2026. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and twelve months ended March 31, 2026. This will encompass the Balance Sheet, Statement of Profit & Loss, and Cash Flow Statement for the financial year. Additionally, the Board will consider and recommend a Final Dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This meeting is in compliance with Regulation 29 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Gujarat Hotels Board to meet on April 23, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Board will consider recommending a final dividend for FY26.
  • The meeting complies with SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT HOTELS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SENINFO] Senthil Infotek receives detailed public statement for open offer
item.description:
Senthil Infotek Ltd. has received a detailed public statement (DPS) from Synfinx Capital Private Limited concerning an open offer. The offer is being made by Kolli Murali Krishna (Acquirer 1) and Gogineni Srinivas (Acquirer 2) to the public shareholders of Senthil Infotek. This open offer is in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The public announcement for this offer was made on April 08, 2026. Acquirer 1, Kolli Murali Krishna, has over 10 years of experience in construction and real estate, with a net worth of ₹824.80 Lakhs as of March 20, 2026. Acquirer 2, Gogineni Srinivas, has over 20 years of experience in software services.

  • Senthil Infotek received a detailed public statement for an open offer.
  • Kolli Murali Krishna and Gogineni Srinivas are the acquirers.
  • The open offer targets public shareholders of the company.
  • It complies with SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations.
  • Acquirers have experience in real estate and software services.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Senthil Infotek Ltd | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [UNIVPHOTO] Universus Photo: NCLAT dismisses shareholder's appeal, upholds NCLT order
item.description:
Universus Photo Imagings Ltd announced that the Hon'ble National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) has allowed the withdrawal of an appeal filed by shareholder Mr. Ankit Jain. The appeal challenged an earlier order from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Allahabad Bench, dated October 15, 2025, which had ruled in favor of the company. With the NCLAT's dismissal of the appeal on April 16, 2026, the NCLT's original order, favorable to Universus Photo Imagings, remains operative. The company is awaiting the formal order and will make further disclosures upon its receipt, ensuring compliance with any directions. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • NCLAT dismissed shareholder appeal against Universus Photo Imagings.
  • NCLT's original order, favorable to the company, remains operative.
  • Shareholder Ankit Jain withdrew his appeal before NCLAT.
  • Company awaits formal NCLAT order for further disclosure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [IBREALEST] Embassy Developments completes sale of Sepset Real Estate subsidiary
item.description:
Embassy Developments Ltd has announced the completion of the sale of 100% of the equity share capital of Sepset Real Estate Limited, its wholly-owned subsidiary. The transaction was executed with Pen India Private Limited, a third-party independent buyer, following a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) intimated on April 12, 2026. All closing precedents and conditions stipulated under the SPA have been satisfactorily fulfilled. The transfer was completed on April 16, 2026, and as a result, Sepset Real Estate Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of Embassy Developments Ltd from that date. The necessary regulatory disclosures were previously made.

  • Embassy Developments completed the sale of its wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • 100% equity of Sepset Real Estate Limited transferred to Pen India Private Limited.
  • Sepset Real Estate ceased to be a subsidiary effective April 16, 2026.
  • The sale was finalized after fulfilling all SPA closing conditions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIABULLS REAL ESTATE LTD. | Category: Divestment

item.title: [KOLTEPATIL] KPDL Q4 FY26 Sales up 13% to Y714 Cr; FY26 Sales at Y2,605 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kolte-Patil Developers Limited (KPDL) announced its operational update for Q4 and FY26. For Q4 FY26, sales grew 13% YoY to Y714 crore, with record quarterly collections of Y834 crore, up 18% YoY. For the full year FY26, annual sales reached Y2,605 crore, and record annual collections stood at Y2,689 crore, an 11% YoY increase. Average price realization in Q4 FY26 was a record Y9,601 per sq. ft., up 21% YoY. The company launched ~1 million sq. ft. in Q4 FY26 and ~4.6 million sq. ft. for FY26. KPDL also acquired projects in Bhugaon with an aggregate GDV of ~ Y2,250 crore in FY26. A significant development was Blackstone acquiring a 40% stake in the company during FY26, strengthening its strategic position for future growth.

  • Record Q4 FY26 collections reached Y834 crore, marking an 18% YoY increase.
  • FY26 annual sales stood at Y2,605 crore, with collections at Y2,689 crore, up 11% YoY.
  • Average price realization hit a record Y9,601/sq. ft. in Q4 FY26, up 21% YoY.
  • Blackstone acquired a 40% strategic stake in the company during FY26.
  • New projects with a GDV of ~ Y2,250 crore were acquired in Bhugaon in FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KOLTE-PATIL DEVELOPERS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [ABSLAMC] ABSL AMC Board to meet April 23 for Q4 FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Ltd announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Thursday, April 23, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting includes the consideration and approval of the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a dividend, if any, on the equity shares for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities remains closed for designated persons from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the financial results announcement, specifically until April 25, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 23, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Dividend recommendation for FY26 to be considered.
  • Trading window closed until April 25, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INFOBEAN] Infobeans Board to meet Apr 28 for Q4/FY26 results, dividend & ESOPs
item.description:
Infobeans Technologies Ltd. has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for April 28, 2026, to be held via video conferencing. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the board will discuss the allotment of equity shares resulting from the exercise of ESOPs and will consider recommending a final dividend on equity shares for the year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 28, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • To consider and recommend final dividend for FY26.
  • To approve allotment of equity shares from ESOPs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Infobeans Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SWELECTES] SWELECT commissions 110/33 KV PSS for 50 MW solar project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Swelect Energy Systems Ltd has successfully commissioned a new 110/33 KV Pooling Substation (PSS) at Sirungattur, Tiruvanamalai District, Tamil Nadu, on April 16, 2026. This PSS, equipped with a 1 X 50 MVA, 110/33 KV Power Transformer, provides crucial 110 KV connectivity. Its primary function is to facilitate the evacuation of power from the company's 50 MW Solar Power project located in the Villupuram Operation Circle, enhancing the company's renewable energy infrastructure.

  • New 110/33 KV Pooling Substation commissioned by SWELECT.
  • PSS includes a 1 X 50 MVA, 110/33 KV Power Transformer.
  • Facilitates power evacuation from a 50 MW solar project.
  • Enhances company's renewable energy infrastructure in Tamil Nadu.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Swelect Energy Systems Limited-$ | Category: Project Update
